title: Plum Pride Filé Filipino Vegetable Dish
description: A buttery and creamy vegetable dish with plum jam as a delightful touch, perfect for vegetarians and vegans.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onions, carrots)
2 tablespoons of vegetable broth or water
2 teaspoons of crushed red pepper flakes (optional)
2 cups of chicken or vegetable broth

instructions: Sauté garlic in butter until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add mixed vegetables and cook until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in red pepper flakes if using, then add flour and stir well, forming a roux consistency. Gradually pour in broth, stirring continuously to prevent lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low. Stir in plum jam, salt, and pepper, let it thicken for about 5 minutes or until desired thickness is achieved.
Pour in diced tomatoes, stir well. Place into a baking dish, cover with foil and bake for 20-30 minutes or until heated through.
Garnish with chives if using before serving.
